bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=daily-report-editor (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 12 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-07-13 · [research_task] 复核情绪报告海外叙事来源

DONE · owner=sentiment-analyst

sentiment-analyst 应复核早盘期权 PCR 升至 1.24、IV 跳升、以及 SK Hynix/Hologram 叙事的来源，区分硬数据与未核验部分。[S7]

  • Outcome: Covered in 海外叙事与未核验信号 / Overseas Narratives and Unverified Signals: PCR 1.24 and IV marked source-unknown, SK Hynix sourced, Hologram excluded.

2026-07-13 · [coverage_followup] 补全工业机械供应商订单确认清单

IN_PROGRESS · owner=industrials-analyst

在现有 19%–33% funnel 基础上，补全供应商层面的订单确认清单，解决 operator 指出的产业链 3.4% 低激活率问题。[S4][S7]

  • Status: in progress

2026-07-13 · [research_task] 建立三省技改 Capex 可跟踪清单

IN_PROGRESS · owner=industrials-analyst

让 industrials-analyst 将三省技改 Capex funnel 转为可跟踪清单，需区分通用机械、环保设备、数字化等环节。[S7]

  • Status: in progress

2026-07-13 · [cross_analyst_review] 统一 3M NCD 利差定义

IN_PROGRESS

解决 rp_552290bbd6944f37 使用 +61bp 以上与 operator 反馈中约 20 bps 之间的口径张力，需明确不同曲线或基准的差异。[S4][S5]

  • Status: in progress

2026-07-13 · [cross_analyst_review] 协调市场涨跌家数口径不一致问题

DONE

研究档案 中的上涨 756、下跌 4394 与 02/03 文件的 790/4676 不一致，需核查并统一数据。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-07-13 · [research_task] Follow up on CNH liquidity and FX settlement impacts

DONE · owner=fx-strategist

Following the analysis of CNH liquidity signals and USD/CNH settlement surpluses [Source: Theme 3], follow-up is required from the fx-strategist.

  • Outcome: delegation→fx-strategist reverted to operator (14d SLA)

2026-07-13 · [research_task] Follow up on China's OMO easing and A-share allocation

DONE · owner=bond-analyst

Following the analysis of deepened US-China yield inversion and its impact on CGB/A-share allocation [Source: Theme 3], follow-up is required from the bond-analyst.

  • Outcome: delegation→bond-analyst reverted to operator (14d SLA)

2026-07-13 · [coverage_followup] Address coverage gap in 工业机械产业链 (Industrial Machinery)

IN_PROGRESS · owner=industrials-analyst · research discussion=Address coverage gap in 工业机械产业链 (Industrial Machinery) (led by industrials-analyst)

The 工业机械产业链 has a very low activation rate of 3.4% and requires coverage improvement. See §6.1.

  • Status: in progress

  • Forecasts: 12 (0 positions); tickers: 600031.SH, 603298.SH, 002353.SZ, 002747.SZ, 601100.SH, 000425.SZ

2026-07-12 · [research_task] 查找证明 PQC 与后量子密码业务相关的文件

DONE

查找明确证明 PQC 与后量子密码业务相关的文件，以判断 NIST、OMB、CISA 等政策是否构成实质顺风。见报告『风险与核验优先级』第 5 项。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

DONE

搜寻董事会公告、股东 Hi 股东大会资料、股权激励计划或公司行动公告，以判断 M&A、重组、回购、增发和激励计划。见报告『风险与核验优先级』第 4 项。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

DONE

获取最近一期年报、季报或上市文件，以建立收入基准、利润基准和事件影响幅度。见报告『风险与核验优先级』第 3 项。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

DONE

寻找公司官网、投资者关系页或新闻稿页，以判断新产品、订单、客户合作和业务线进展。见报告『风险与核验优先级』第 2 项。
